description: Bunnyshell is an environments-as-a-service platform for creating and operating preview, staging, production, and remote development environments on Kubernetes. It provides environment automation, deployment workflows, and developer tooling around cloud-native application environments.
summary: Bunnyshell exposes a public REST API for its Environments platform and an open-source `bns` CLI; both use a user-generated Bunnyshell access token. No separate GraphQL or MCP connect endpoint was publicly documented on bunnyshell.com/docs during discovery.
